  • Index

Uses of Annotation Interface
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestGet

Packages that use RestGet
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty.resources
Predefined Jetty Microservice Resources
org.apache.juneau.microservice.management
Actuator-style management-surface endpoints (microservice-module flavors).
org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources
Predefined Microservice Resources
org.apache.juneau.petstore.rest
Petstore REST resources.
org.apache.juneau.petstore.springboot
Apache Juneau Petstore - Spring Boot deployment.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention
Convention-endpoints mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the "internet conventions" surface (favicon, robots, sitemap, version, well-known) every public-facing service eventually grows.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.docs
API-docs mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that publish Swagger v2 and OpenAPI 3.1 spec endpoints with Swagger-UI and Redoc HTML mounts.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health
Built-in health, readiness, and liveness probe support for Juneau REST servers.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management
Actuator-style management-surface endpoints (server-module flavors).
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.micrometer
Micrometer bridge for the juneau-rest-server MetricsRecorder SPI.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops
Ops / introspection mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the operational surface (request echo, JVM admin, route index) every long-running Juneau service eventually grows.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.remote
Remote service API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.staticfile
REST Static Files Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view
Engine-agnostic server-side-rendered view extension point.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.freemarker
Apache FreeMarker view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-freemarker module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.jsp
JSP view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-jsp module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.mustache
Mustache view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-mustache module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf
Thymeleaf view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-thymeleaf module.
org.apache.juneau.server.config.rest
Server Configuration REST

  • Uses of RestGet in org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty.resources

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ResourceDescriptions
    DebugResource.getChildren()
    [GET /] - Shows child utilities.
    Reader
    DebugResource.getJettyDump(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    [GET /jetty/dump] - Generates and retrieves the jetty thread dump.

    Method
    Description

    [GET /info] - Application build/version/git metadata from the manifest.

    [GET /] - Application build/version/git metadata from the manifest.

    Returns information about the specified file or directory.

  • Uses of RestGet in org.apache.juneau.petstore.rest

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.petstore.rest with annotations of type RestGet
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Order
    PetStoreResource.getOrder(long id)
    Retrieves an order by ID.
    Collection<Order>
    PetStoreResource.getOrders()
    Lists all orders.
    Pet
    PetSecureResource.getPet(long id)
    Retrieves a pet by ID.
    Pet
    PetStoreResource.getPet(long id)
    Retrieves a pet by ID.
    Collection<Pet>
    PetSecureResource.getPets()
    Lists all pets.
    Collection<Pet>
    PetStoreResource.getPets()
    Lists all pets.
    User
    PetStoreResource.getUser(String username)
    Retrieves a user by username.
    Collection<User>
    PetStoreResource.getUsers()
    Lists all users.
    View
    PetFreemarkerViewResource.viewPet(long id)
    GET /pets/{id}/view — renders a pet detail HTML page through FreeMarker.
    View
    PetMustacheViewResource.viewPet(long id)
    GET /pets/{id}/view — renders a pet detail HTML page through Mustache.
    Map<String,String>
    PetSecureResource.whoami(Principal caller)
    Returns the name of the authenticated principal — the simplest possible "auth worked" probe.

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.petstore.springboot with annotations of type RestGet
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    HelloResource.sayHello()
    GET /hello/* — returns the message provided by the injected Spring bean.

  • Uses of RestGet in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention with annotations of type RestGet
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HttpResource
    FaviconMixin.getFavicon()
    [GET /favicon.ico] — serve the configured favicon bytes.
    HttpResource
    FaviconResource.getFavicon()
    [GET /*] — serve the configured favicon bytes.
    HttpResource
    FaviconServlet.getFavicon()
    [GET /*] — serve the configured favicon bytes.
    void
    VersionMixin.getInfo(RestResponse res)
    [GET /version] — emit the assembled metadata as a JSON map.
    void
    VersionResource.getInfo(RestResponse res)
    [GET /*] — emit the assembled metadata as a JSON map.
    void
    VersionServlet.getInfo(RestResponse res)
    [GET /*] — emit the assembled metadata as a JSON map.
    void
    SeoMixin.getRobotsTxt(RestResponse res)
    [GET /robots.txt] — emit the configured robots policy as text/plain.
    void
    WellKnownMixin.getSecurityTxt(RestResponse res)
    [GET /.well-known/security.txt] — emit the configured RFC 9116 body, or 404 when unset.
    void
    SeoMixin.getSitemap(RestResponse res)
    [GET /sitemap.xml] — emit the configured sitemap as application/xml.

  • Uses of RestGet in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.docs

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.docs with annotations of type RestGet
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    OpenApi
    OpenApiMixin.getOpenApi(RestRequest req)
    [GET /openapi] — emit the OpenAPI 3.1 document for this resource.
    void
    OpenApiMixin.getOpenApiJson(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    [GET /openapi.json] — emit the OpenAPI 3.1 document as JSON, ignoring the Accept header.
    void
    OpenApiMixin.getOpenApiYaml(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    [GET /openapi.yaml] — emit the OpenAPI 3.1 document as YAML, ignoring the Accept header.
    OpenApi
    RedocMixin.getRedoc(RestRequest req)
    [GET /redoc] — render the Redoc HTML view (or the spec, depending on Accept).
    Swagger
    SwaggerMixin.getSwagger(RestRequest req)
    [GET /api] — emit the Swagger v2 spec for this resource.
    Swagger
    SwaggerUiMixin.getSwaggerUi(RestRequest req)
    [GET /swagger] — render the Swagger-UI HTML view (or the spec, depending on Accept).

    [GET /heapdump] - HotSpot heap dump (hprof) stream.

    [GET /loggers/{name}] - One logger's configured level.

    [GET /] - All loggers and their configured levels.
    String

    [GET /threaddump] - Full thread dump from the ThreadMXBean.
    String

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ViewResource.render(String path, RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    [GET /*] — render the raw template identified by the trailing path under this child's subtree mount.
    void
    ViewServlet.render(String path, RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    [GET /*] — render the raw template identified by the trailing path under this servlet's sibling top-level mount.
